category.scope_note: Hand-held and transportable electric and cordless power tools exported from China to Kuwait, including chargers, battery packs, and electronic controllers within the marketed system.

title.en: China-to-Kuwait Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入科威特：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入科威特：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Kuwait KUCAS conformity, GSO/IEC electrical safety, EMC, CITRA radio approval, and battery and substance requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与科威特 KUCAS 符合性、GSO/IEC 电气安全、电磁兼容、CITRA 无线电批准及电池与物质要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與科威特 KUCAS 符合性、GSO/IEC 電氣安全、電磁相容、CITRA 無線電批准及電池與物質要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Kuwait law, GSO standards, KUCAS conformity scope, CITRA radio rules, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行科威特法律、GSO 标准、KUCAS 符合性范围、CITRA 无线电规则及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行科威特法律、GSO 標準、KUCAS 符合性範圍、CITRA 無線電規則及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Kuwait, the mandatory baseline is KUCAS conformity administered by the Public Authority for Industry, with GSO standards that adopt IEC/EN 62841 for electrical and mechanical safety, EMC compliance, CITRA type approval for any cordless radio function, and battery and substance evidence; the Kuwait grid is 240 V 50 Hz, sharing China's 50 Hz frequency but a different nominal voltage.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入科威特，强制基线是由公共工业局（PAI）实施的 KUCAS 符合性，采用 GSO 标准（其引用 IEC/EN 62841 用于电气和机械安全）、EMC 合规、对任何无绳无线电功能的 CITRA 型号核准，以及电池与物质证据；科威特电网为 240 V 50 Hz，与中国同为 50 Hz，但标称电压不同。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入科威特，強制基線是由公共工業局（PAI）實施的 KUCAS 符合性，採用 GSO 標準（其引用 IEC/EN 62841 用於電氣和機械安全）、EMC 合規、對任何無繩無線電功能的 CITRA 型號核准，以及電池與物質證據；科威特電網為 240 V 50 Hz，與中國同為 50 Hz，但標稱電壓不同。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity body, customs, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
